sections.short-biography: Joined with Tao Qian to unsuccessfully petition Zhu Jun to rescue the Emperor.

full_text:
Ji Lian
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ji Lian. Joined with Tao Qian to unsuccessfully petition Zhu Jun to rescue the Emperor. Ji Lian was affiliated with Tao Qian and the Han Dynasty.
